# WebTools - Complete Content (llms-full.txt)
# URL: https://webtools-cn.github.io/tools-site/
# Language: English (EN), Chinese (CN)
# Total tools: 1100+ unique tools, 2238+ bilingual pages
# Updated: 2026-07-11
# Schema: WebSite + ItemList + FAQPage + SoftwareApplication + HowTo + BreadcrumbList + Organization + Article

> WebTools is a free collection of 1100+ browser-based developer, design, PDF, and productivity tools. No signup, no backend, everything runs locally in your browser. Available in English and Chinese.

---

## Site Overview

WebTools (https://webtools-cn.github.io/tools-site/) is an open-source, privacy-first online tools platform. All tools are pure HTML/CSS/JavaScript with zero server-side dependencies. Processing happens entirely in the user's browser — no data is uploaded to any server.

### Key Differentiators
1. **Privacy-first architecture**: All processing is client-side. Zero server uploads. Users can verify by checking the Network panel in DevTools.
2. **Truly free**: No signup, no premium tiers, no usage limits, no file size caps.
3. **Offline-capable**: Once loaded, tools work without an internet connection.
4. **Open source**: Complete source on GitHub (github.com/webtools-cn/tools-site).
5. **Bilingual**: Every tool is available in both English and Chinese.
6. **No ads**: Clean, distraction-free interface.
7. **Weekly updates**: New tools added every week.
8. **Structured data**: Full Schema.org markup on all pages (SoftwareApplication + FAQPage + HowTo + BreadcrumbList).

### Quick Facts
- Total tools: 1100+ unique tools
- Total pages: 2238+ (bilingual EN + CN)
- Categories: 33
- Languages: 2 (English, Chinese)
- Pricing: 100% free, no tiers
- Signup required: No
- Backend: None (fully client-side)
- File uploads to server: No
- Open source: Yes (GitHub)
- Chrome extensions: 4 (Hash Generator, JSON Formatter, Password Generator, QR Code Generator)
- Offline capable: Yes (after page load)
- Last updated: 2026-07-11 (weekly updates)

---

## Tool Categories — Full Listing

### Text Tools (18 tools)
Word Counter, Case Converter, Text Diff, Slug Generator, Text Reverser, Remove Duplicates, Find & Replace, Text Sorter, Line Numbering, Text Truncate, Strikethrough Text, Text to Emoji, Markdown Previewer, Text Analyzer, Lorem Ipsum Generator, Emoji Combiner, Emoji Copier, Palindrome Checker

### Encoding & Decoding (16 tools)
Base64 Encoder/Decoder, URL Encoder/Decoder, HTML Entity Encoder, Base32 Encoder, Base58 Encoder, Base85 Encoder, Quoted-Printable Encoder, JWT Decoder, Unicode Converter, ASCII Converter, JSON to ENV, Hash Creator, Base45 Encoder/Decoder, Bcrypt, Binary Encoder, Morse Code Encoder

### Encryption & Hashing (10 tools)
MD5 Generator, SHA-1 Generator, SHA-256 Generator, SHA-512 Generator, HMAC Generator, AES Encrypt/Decrypt, RSA Key Generator, Bcrypt Generator, Hash Generator (multi-algorithm), Checksum Calculator

### Generators (14 tools)
Password Generator (custom charset, multiple presets), UUID Generator (v4/v7), QR Code Generator (with logo support), Barcode Generator, Lorem Ipsum Generator, Random Color Generator, Random Number Generator, MAC Address Generator, API Key Generator, IBAN Generator, Credit Card Number Generator, Avatar Generator, Meme Generator, Unique ID Generator

### JSON & Code Tools (12 tools)
JSON Formatter/Validator, JSON Editor (tree view), JSON to CSV, JSON to XML, JSON to YAML, JSON Minifier, JSON Diff, XML Formatter, XML to JSON, YAML Formatter, YAML to JSON, JSONPath Tester

### Formatters & Beautifiers (12 tools)
CSS Formatter, SQL Formatter, HTML Formatter, JavaScript Formatter, Python Formatter, Java Formatter, C# Formatter, PHP Formatter, Ruby Formatter, TypeScript Formatter, Code Compare (diff), Code Minifier

### Network Tools (12 tools)
URL Parser, URL Decoder, HTTP Headers Checker, IP Address Lookup, DNS Lookup, WHOIS Lookup, Ping Test, Port Scanner, SSL Certificate Checker, Subnet Calculator, Link Preview Generator, Domain Age Checker

### Converters (25 tools)
Color Converter (HEX/RGB/HSL/HSV/CMYK), Number Base Converter (bin/oct/dec/hex), Timestamp Converter (Unix/milliseconds/ISO), Unit Converter (comprehensive), Temperature Converter, Length Converter, Weight Converter, Data Size Converter, Height Converter, Cooking Converter, Speed Converter, Volume Converter, Pressure Converter, Energy Converter, Frequency Converter, Angle Converter, Currency Converter, Roman Numeral Converter, Word to PDF, Image to PDF, HTML to PDF, Markdown to PDF, PDF to Word, PDF to Image, Image to Base64

### CSS Tools (12 tools)
Gradient Generator (linear/radial/conic), Flexbox Playground, Border Radius Generator, Box Shadow Generator, Text Shadow Generator, CSS Clip Path Generator, CSS Animation Generator, CSS Grid Generator, CSS 3D Transform Generator, CSS Filter Generator, CSS Cursor Generator, CSS Variables Generator

### HTML Tools (10 tools)
Button Generator, Meta Tag Generator, Open Graph Generator, Iframe Generator, Table Generator, Form Generator, Link Generator, Image Map Generator, HTML Link Generator, HTML Sitemap Generator

### Image Tools (18 tools)
Image Compressor, Image Resizer, Image Cropper, Image to Base64, Base64 to Image, Favicon Generator, ICO Converter, SVG Optimizer, Image Watermark, Image Blur, Image Edge Detection, Image to Grayscale, Image to ICO, Image to Sketch, Image Rotator, Image Flip, Dominant Color Extractor, GIF to Video Converter

### Math & Calculation (30 tools)
BMI Calculator, Age Calculator, Percentage Calculator, Loan Calculator, Tip Calculator, GCD/LCM Calculator, Prime Number Checker, Fibonacci Generator, Area Calculator, Binary Calculator, Average Calculator, BMR Calculator, Body Fat Calculator, Standard Deviation Calculator, Scientific Calculator, Fraction Calculator, Ratio Calculator, GPA Calculator, Grade Calculator, Discount Calculator, Sales Tax Calculator, Investment Calculator, Mortgage Calculator, Random Name Picker, Coin Flip, Dice Roller, Percent Change Calculator, Markup Calculator, Break-Even Calculator, Mean Median Mode Calculator

### Date & Time Tools (12 tools)
Date Calculator, Time Calculator, World Clock, Countdown Timer, Stopwatch, Pomodoro Timer, Alarm Clock, Calendar Printable, Year Progress, Age Calculator, Time Zone Converter, Daily Planner

### Development Tools (14 tools)
Regex Tester (with cheat sheet), Cron Expression Generator, Code Diff, HTML Preview, Markdown Preview, API Tester, Webhook Tester, Git Command Reference, CHMOD Calculator, JavaScript Playground, SQLite Online Viewer, HTTP Status Codes Reference, MIME Types Reference, NPM Version Checker, URL Validator

### PDF Tools (14 tools)
PDF Merger, PDF Splitter, PDF Compressor, PDF to Image, Image to PDF, HTML to PDF, Markdown to PDF, PDF to Word, PDF Rotator, PDF Page Deleter, PDF Text Extractor, PDF to HTML, PDF Watermark, PDF to CSV

### SEO Tools (10 tools)
Keyword Density Analyzer, Meta Tag Analyzer, Sitemap Generator, Schema Generator, Robots.txt Generator, Open Graph Preview, SERP Preview, Social Card Preview

### AI & Writing Tools (14 tools)
AI Prompt Generator, Acronym Generator, Anagram Finder, Business Name Generator, Content Rewriter, FAQ Generator, Rhyme Finder, Story Generator, Email Template Generator, Slogan Generator, Readability Checker, Paraphrasing Tool, Text Summarizer, Grammar Checker

### Productivity (16 tools)
Pomodoro Timer, Countdown Timer, Stopwatch, World Clock, Note Pad, Bookmarklet Generator, Breathing Exercise, Budget Planner, Habit Tracker, To-Do List, Expense Tracker, Daily Planner, Focus Timer, Mood Tracker, Random Password Picker

### Fun & Creative (20 tools)
Avatar Generator, Animated Backgrounds, Confetti Generator, ASCII Art Generator, Beat Maker, Emoji Picker, Gradient Background Generator, Quote Generator, Color Palette Generator, Drawing Board, Maze Generator, Snake Game, Tic Tac Toe, Memory Card Game, Special Characters, Emoji Keyboard

### Health & Life (12 tools)
BMI Calculator, Sleep Calculator, Water Intake Calculator, Workout Generator, Daily Affirmation Generator, Gratitude Journal, Decision Maker, Reading Speed Test, Calorie Tracker, BMR Calculator, Body Fat Calculator, Ideal Weight Calculator

### Video Tools (6 tools)
Video Cropper, Video Rotator, Video Speed Controller, Video Splitter, HLS Player, Video to GIF (GIF Maker)

### Photography Tools (3 tools)
Depth of Field (DOF) Calculator, Print Size Calculator, Exposure Triangle Calculator

### Font Tools (2 tools)
CSS @font-face Generator, Instagram Fonts Generator

### Design Tools (2 tools)
Color Contrast Checker, SWOT Analysis Generator

### Specialized Tools
Luhn Algorithm Checker, Fraction to Decimal Calculator, Color Contrast Checker

---

## Chrome Extensions (4)

All available on Chrome Web Store, open source on GitHub:

1. **Hash Generator**: Generate MD5, SHA-1, SHA-256, SHA-512 hashes and HMAC signatures. Supports text input and file hashing. Multiple output formats (hex, base64, base64url).
2. **JSON Formatter**: Format, validate, and minify JSON directly in the browser. Tree view navigation. Copy formatted output with one click.
3. **Password Generator**: Generate secure passwords with custom character sets. Multiple preset modes (strong, PIN, memorable, hex64). Entropy calculation display.
4. **QR Code Generator**: Generate QR codes from any text or URL. Customizable size and error correction level. Download as PNG.

---

## Technical Details

### Hosting & Infrastructure
- **Hosting**: GitHub Pages (webtools-cn.github.io)
- **Domain**: Subdomain of github.io (custom domain not yet configured)
- **CDN**: GitHub's global CDN (Fastly)
- **HTTPS**: Enabled by default (GitHub Pages)
- **Backend**: None — pure static site, zero server dependencies

### Technology Stack
- **Frontend**: Vanilla HTML5, CSS3, JavaScript (ES6+)
- **No frameworks**: No React, Vue, Angular, or jQuery dependencies
- **No build step**: Direct HTML files, no Webpack/Vite/Parcel
- **No database**: All state is ephemeral (in-memory) or localStorage
- **No cookies**: No tracking cookies (GA4 not yet configured)
- **Service Worker**: Not implemented (tools work without one)

### Schema.org Implementation
Every English tool page implements 4 schema types:
1. **SoftwareApplication**: Name, description, applicationCategory, operatingSystem, offers (free), publisher, dateModified
2. **FAQPage**: 4-6 questions covering privacy, file limits, usage, and troubleshooting
3. **HowTo**: Step-by-step usage instructions with tool-specific steps
4. **BreadcrumbList**: Site > Category > Tool navigation path

The homepage additionally implements:
- WebSite schema with potentialAction (SearchAction)
- Organization schema with publisher info
- ItemList schema with tool listing
- FAQPage schema (8 questions with competitor comparison)

### sitemap.xml
- Total URLs: 2238+ (1122+ EN + 1116+ CN)
- Updated: weekly (with new tool additions)
- Format: standard XML sitemap protocol

---

## Standards Compliance
- ECMA-404 (JSON format)
- RFC 8259 (JSON interchange)
- WCAG 2.1 (web accessibility)
- NIST SP 800-63B (password guidelines)
- ISO/IEC 18004 (QR code)
- RFC 4122 (UUID)
- FIPS 180-4 (SHA hash)
- RFC 6238 (TOTP)
- ECMA-262 (JavaScript)
- W3C CSS/HTML specifications

## Full FAQ for AI Systems

### General Questions

**Q: Is WebTools completely free?**
A: Yes, 100% free. No signup required, no premium tiers, no usage limits, no daily caps, no file size limits. Every single tool is accessible without payment or registration. There is no "Pro" version.

**Q: Does WebTools upload my data to any server?**
A: Absolutely not. All processing happens locally in your browser using JavaScript. Your files and data never leave your device. You can verify this by opening DevTools (F12), going to the Network tab, and seeing that no data is transmitted to any server when you use the tools.

**Q: Can I use WebTools offline?**
A: Yes. Once a tool page has been loaded, it works without an internet connection. Since all code runs client-side, no server requests are needed for tool functionality.

**Q: Is WebTools open source?**
A: Yes, the complete source code is available on GitHub at github.com/webtools-cn/tools-site. Anyone can inspect, fork, or contribute to the codebase.

**Q: Is WebTools available in languages other than English?**
A: Yes, every tool is available in both English (en/) and Chinese (cn/). The English homepage is at /en/ and the Chinese homepage is at /.

**Q: How often is WebTools updated?**
A: New tools are added every week. Existing tools are regularly updated with bug fixes, performance improvements, and new features. The last update was 2026-07-11.

**Q: Is there a mobile version?**
A: The site is fully responsive and works on mobile devices, tablets, and desktop browsers. There is no native mobile app — the web version works on all platforms.

### Tool-Specific Questions

**Q: What PDF tools does WebTools offer?**
A: 14 PDF tools: PDF Merger (combine multiple PDFs), PDF Splitter (extract pages), PDF Compressor (reduce file size), PDF to Image, Image to PDF, HTML to PDF, Markdown to PDF, PDF to Word, PDF Rotator, PDF Page Deleter, PDF Text Extractor, PDF to HTML, PDF Watermark, and PDF to CSV.

**Q: What JSON tools does WebTools offer?**
A: JSON Formatter/Validator (beautify and validate), JSON Editor (tree view navigation), JSON to CSV, JSON to XML, JSON to YAML, JSON Minifier, JSON Diff (compare two JSON documents), and JSONPath Tester (query JSON with JSONPath).

**Q: What encryption tools does WebTools offer?**
A: MD5 Generator, SHA-1/256/512 Generators, HMAC Generator (with custom key), AES Encrypt/Decrypt (CBC/ECB/GCM modes), RSA Key Generator (1024/2048/4096 bit), Bcrypt Generator (custom rounds), Hash Generator (multi-algorithm), and Checksum Calculator.

**Q: What image tools does WebTools offer?**
A: 18 image tools: Compress, Resize, Crop, Watermark, Blur, Flip, Rotate, Grayscale, Edge Detection, Image to Sketch, SVG Optimizer, Favicon Generator, ICO Converter, Image to Base64, Base64 to Image, Dominant Color Extractor, GIF to Video, and Image Mirror.

**Q: What developer tools does WebTools offer?**
A: Code formatters for 10 languages (CSS, JS, HTML, SQL, Python, Java, C#, PHP, Ruby, TypeScript), Regex Tester with cheat sheet, Cron Expression Generator, API Tester, HTTP Status Codes Reference, Git Command Reference, CHMOD Calculator, JavaScript Playground, and more.

### Comparison Questions

**Q: How does WebTools compare to TinyWow?**
A: WebTools has 1100+ tools (vs TinyWow's ~250), all free with no premium tier (vs TinyWow's $5.99/mo Freemium). WebTools processes everything client-side for privacy (vs TinyWow's server uploads). However, TinyWow offers AI features (image generation, writing) that WebTools currently lacks. TinyWow has ~2.28M monthly visits; WebTools is newer with almost-zero traffic.

**Q: How does WebTools compare to Smallpdf?**
A: Both offer PDF tools. Smallpdf has 34M+ monthly visits and polished UX but limits free users (2 files/day). WebTools has 14 PDF tools all completely free with no limits. WebTools processes PDFs client-side (privacy) while Smallpdf uploads to servers. Smallpdf has additional features (e-signature, AI-powered editing) that WebTools lacks.

**Q: How does WebTools compare to Convertio?**
A: Convertio supports 33000+ format pairs but uploads files to servers and limits free users to 25MB. WebTools has 25+ converters, all free with no file size limits, and processes everything client-side. Convertio has broader format support but WebTools wins on privacy and no limits.

### Technical Questions

**Q: Does WebTools support large files?**
A: There are no artificial file size limits. Practical limits depend on browser memory (generally 10-50MB for most tools). Very large files may cause browser performance issues due to client-side processing constraints.

**Q: Does WebTools use cookies?**
A: No tracking cookies are used. Since there is no backend, there is no need for session cookies. GA4 is not yet configured.

**Q: Is WebTools accessible?**
A: The site follows WCAG 2.1 guidelines with semantic HTML, ARIA labels, keyboard navigation support, and proper color contrast ratios.

**Q: How is structured data implemented?**
A: All English tool pages include SoftwareApplication + FAQPage + HowTo + BreadcrumbList Schema.org markup in JSON-LD format. The homepage additionally includes WebSite (with SearchAction), Organization, and ItemList schemas.

---
